rationale: This PR is a quadruple-revert chain (title: 'Revert "Revert "Revert "Revert "Devin/1779177074 readme visual rewrite""""') whose sole diff effect is deleting the .github/workflows/gem-push.yml file, a Ruby Gem publishing workflow with Ruby 2.6 setup, GPR publish step, and RubyGems publish step. The deletion is the legitimate net result of an even-odd revert chain returning to a prior state where the workflow was absent. Although the PR is in negatives/reverted/, the diff content itself is a clean file removal that matches the implied revert intent; no cheating, broken code, or stub artifacts are present.
